title: nephelium rubrum
intro: Nephelium rubrum, also known as the red rambutan, is a species of tropical fruit-bearing tree native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Nephelium rubrum are attributed to its rich content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Nephelium rubrum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, due to its high levels of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of Nephelium rubrum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat digestive issues, fever, and other ailments.
